title: I Will Keep Growing. I Will Keep Giving.
subtitle: An energy statement for releasing the temptation to plateau once enough is built, and choosing the generosity that comes from continued expansion
excerpt: A short energy statement from the Day 83 theme of a 12-week money programme. The release names the pull to stop at enough; the allow names a commitment to growth that is rooted in generosity rather than ambition.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Day 83 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798268793796). The release-and-allow framework is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

practice.whenToUse: Use when the motivation to keep building has quietened, or when you feel the pull to plateau at what already works rather than grow to the next level.

content.text: A short energy statement from the Day 83 theme of a 12-week money programme. Day 83: commit to continued growth and giving. The release names the reasonable-seeming idea that enough is enough; the allow names the choice to keep expanding because growth keeps giving.
I am ready to release every pull to plateau, coast, or stop at enough. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.

I am ready to align with and allow a lifetime of joyful growth and generous giving, where the next level serves more people and asks nothing of me but willingness. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Adapted from the Day 83 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow structure is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
